name: Control Systems NW
description: Provides control system design and integration services for public works and industrial clients in the Pacific Northwest.

name: Landis Consulting Engineering
description: Offers electrical instrumentation & control design including SCADA and telemetry for water & wastewater systems.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I would call Landis first with any electrical or related system issue, either in design or operation.
Landis provides a higher level of construction period, start up & testing, commissioning, and post construction documentation than I have received from other firms.
Met every schedule deadline. The attention to detail and ability to stay within our design budget has been fantastic.
I truly appreciated the expert advice and guidance through this very complicated project.

sentiment.summary: Landis Consulting Engineering has an exceptionally strong reputation for delivering high-quality engineering services on schedule and within budget, with clients consistently praising their professional expertise, cost-saving approach, and superior customer service across complex projects.

name: OCD Automation
description: Specializes in PLC programming, SCADA & HMI programming, and controls design in the Pacific Northwest.

name: Olsson Industrial Electric
description: Offers SCADA systems programming with over 30 years of experience in industrial projects.

name: PLC's Plus International
description: Provides PLCs, HMI, and SCADA programming services for Oregon-based businesses of any project size.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: fast, efficient, and provided exceptional service. I would definitely work with PLCs Plus again
delivered on time and on budget. We're very happy to have PLCs Plus as our partner
After eight years of partnership, I firmly believe your company will benefit from doing business with them
the only Contractor Manager that really delivered for me. Built a strong client relationship

sentiment.summary: PLCs Plus International has exceptionally strong reviews across multiple industries, with clients praising their technical expertise, reliability, on-time delivery, and long-term partnership value.
